name: Wesley's Chili Pizza v 4.0
recipeInstructions:
Pizza dough is very subjective. I won't attempt a recipe here, just make your favorite dough for 1 large pizza.
NO BEANS IN THE CHILI! If you must use canned, I recommend a 15 oz can of Wolf Brand Chili. This will work very nicely.
1. Saute the sausage, mushrooms (stems and caps), and Bell pepper until very lightly browned.
2. Preheat oven to 500°F.
3. Roll pizza dough into a pizza-like shape, and add toppings in this order:
- Chili
- Sausage, 'shrooms, and peppers
- Olives
- Onions
- Cheese
4. Bake for 15-20 minutes. Use a pizza stone if you have one. If you don't have one, get one!
